heading: Maintenance of effort
label: 3030s–2 Maintenance of effort
text: Funds made available under this part shall supplement, and not supplant, any Federal, State, or local funds expended by a State or unit of general purpose local government (including an area agency on aging) to provide services described in .section 3030s–1 of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsPrior sections 3030s–11 and 3030s–12, which comprised subpart II of this part, were repealed by , , .Pub.
